case_title: MARIA FRANCESCA SULAIMANI VS. AMANDA HARPER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2016 (DEFENDANT'S CLAIM) - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT MARIA FRANCESCA SULAIMANI WITH WITNESS SARAH SHAKER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT AMANDA HARPER. PLAINTIFF WAIVES TIMELY SERVICE OF PROCESS ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO FEE FOR SERVICE SERVED OCT-25-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARPER, AMANDA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WHOLESOME BAKERY

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,180.00 FILED BY HARPER, AMANDA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WHOLESOME BAKERY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SULAIMANI, MARIA FRANCESCA C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED NOV-29-0201, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SULAIMANI, MARIA FRANCESCA C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARIA FRANCESCA SULAIMANI WITH WITNESS SARAH SHAKER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AMANDA HARPER. PLAINTIFF WAIVES TIMELY SERVICE OF PROCESS ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HARPER, AMANDA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WHOLESOME BAKERY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SULAIMANI, MARIA FRANCESCA C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,580.25 FILED BY SULAIMANI, MARIA FRANCESCA C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA AS TO DEFENDANT HARPER, AMANDA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WHOLESOME BAKERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-29-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SULAIMANI, MARIA FRANCESCA C/O INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARPER, AMANDA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WHOLESOME BAKERY $61.25 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $111.25, DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO PAY WAGES TO PLAINTIFF WAS NOT WILLFUL. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF IS NOT ENTITLED TO LABOR CODE SECTION 203(A) STATUTORY PENALTIES. DEFENDANT'S ACT OR OMISSION GIVING RISE TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS IN GOOD IN FAITH AND WITH REASONABLE GROUNDS FOR BELIEVING THE ACT OR OMISSION WAS NOT A VIOLATION OF THE LABOR CODE OR COMMISSION ORDER. THEREFORE, LIQUIDATED DAMAGES ARE NOT AWARDED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HARPER, AMANDA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA WHOLESOME BAKERY
